# Basic MCP Git Server Test
# Tests server startup, initialization, and basic protocol handling

# Build the git server binary
go build -o mcp-git-server .

# Create a test git repository
mkdir test_git_repo
cd test_git_repo
git init
git config user.name "Test User"
git config user.email "test@example.com"
echo "# Test Repo" > README.md
git add README.md
git commit -m "Initial commit"

# Test basic MCP protocol initialization with current git repo
exec ../mcp-git-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/list","params":{},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"ping","params":{},"id":3}
EOF

# Verify server information in initialization response
stdout '"name":"git-server"'
stdout '"version":"1.0.0"'

# Verify capabilities are reported
stdout '"tools"'

# Verify all git tools are listed
stdout '"name":"git_status"'
stdout '"description":"Get the status of a git repository"'
stdout '"name":"git_log"'
stdout '"description":"Get the commit log of a git repository"'
stdout '"name":"git_branches"'
stdout '"description":"List branches in a git repository"'
stdout '"name":"git_diff"'
stdout '"description":"Show differences in a git repository"'
stdout '"name":"git_add"'
stdout '"description":"Add files to git staging area"'
stdout '"name":"git_commit"'
stdout '"description":"Create a git commit"'
stdout '"name":"git_create_branch"'
stdout '"description":"Create a new git branch"'
stdout '"name":"git_switch_branch"'
stdout '"description":"Switch to a different git branch"'

# Verify ping response
stdout '"result":"pong"'

# Cleanup
cd ..
rm -rf test_git_repo
